description_long: This monument features a tall, rectangular stone obelisk with a peaked top, mounted on a broad, stepped base. The front face is adorned with a bronze relief medallion and a prominent bronze statue of a kneeling child reaching upward, adding a dramatic and emotional focal point. The upper section of the obelisk displays a decorative triangular pediment with additional bronze embellishments. The sides of the structure are plain, emphasizing the verticality and solidity of the stonework, while the rear is unadorned and flat. The materials appear to be primarily stone and bronze, giving the monument a dignified and enduring presence. This type of structure is commonly found in parks, plazas, or cemeteries as a commemorative or memorial feature.
description: A tall stone obelisk with a peaked top, bronze relief medallion, and a kneeling bronze child statue on a stepped base. Decorative bronze elements accent the front and upper section.
description_view_0: The front view shows the full obelisk, bronze medallion, and the kneeling child statue, with all decorative elements visible.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the depth of the structure and the profile of the child statue, with minimal ornamentation visible.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals a plain, unadorned stone surface with no decorative features or statues.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the side profile of the child statue and the monument's thickness.
attribute_ornamentation: Decorative bronze relief medallion on the front, bronze statue of a kneeling child at the base, and a bronze embellishment in the triangular pediment at the top.
attribute_base_design: The base is broad and stepped, constructed from stone, with angular side extensions and a platform supporting the bronze child statue. The design is solid and geometric, providing stability and visual weight.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is a peaked, triangular pediment with a bronze decorative element, giving the obelisk a classical and dignified finish.
